description_long: This picnic table features a rectangular wooden tabletop composed of four wide planks with a rich reddish-brown finish, displaying a subtle wood grain texture. The table is supported by a central cylindrical metal post, which extends downward and connects to a sturdy base. Two matching wooden benches, each made from a single wide plank, are attached parallel to the tabletop on either side, providing ample seating. The benches and tabletop are fastened with visible metal bolts, ensuring stability and durability. The overall design is robust and functional, suitable for outdoor environments, with a simple yet classic appearance. The table's structure is open underneath, allowing for easy access and legroom.
description: A robust, rectangular wooden picnic table with a central metal support and two attached benches, finished in a reddish-brown wood grain. The design is classic and functional, ideal for outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the end of the tabletop and one bench, highlighting the central support post and the alignment of the planks.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the tabletop and both benches, emphasizing the parallel arrangement and the width of the seating area.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the opposite end of the tabletop and bench, with the central support post visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the full length of the tabletop and benches from the other side.
attribute_tabletop_support_structure: The tabletop is supported by a central cylindrical steel post that connects to a base beneath the table, with the benches also attached to this central support structure.
